description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly matte black body accented by orange highlights. The frame is robust, with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine near the center, suggesting a high-capacity, revolving mechanism. The fore-end and stock are angular and streamlined, with the stock terminating in a flat, orange buttplate. The grip is ergonomic, featuring finger grooves for improved handling, and the trigger guard is large and rounded for accessibility. The upper section includes a partial rail or shroud, and the barrel is relatively short, making the weapon compact and suitable for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a black and orange color scheme, drum magazine, and ergonomic grip. Its angular frame and short barrel suggest a modern, high-capacity design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the orange-accented stock, large drum magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the short, wide barrel opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with clearer visibility of the magazine and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat orange buttplate and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with integrated finger grooves
